rationale: Calibration source is the canary-proxy receipt at bench/out/r3-1-31b-manifest-simfabric-canary-proxy-calibration/receipt.json (sha256 87777ee6b8f5a2165b704f6b4f8d2ef5345d1e32a137a47a522283700026a431). Per-pattern cycles-per-call were derived from bench/out/csl-real-canary-compile/<kernel>/scratch/sim_stats.json files (8x3 fabric, ~14 simulated tiles). Median bytesPerCycle = 0.00449. Ceilings are set to 1.5x the rung-2 receipt's grandPredictedCycles (205,502,778) and per-phase predictedCycles (prefill=103,040,639, decode=102,462,139) so the rung-8 launch has headroom for actual measurement to exceed the canary-proxy prediction. Replace this calibrationStatus with the sha256 of a real manifest-shape rung-3 dispatch once hardware execution lands (R3-1 / R3-3) and supersedes the canary-proxy calibration.
